name.title: Project Name
name.description: Name of the project. No spaces allowed.

pes_paths.description: Pose estimation data files. Supported formats: CSV, SLP, H5 (DeepLabCut / SLEAP / LightningPose), NWB, or movement NetCDF (.nc). All files must be the same type.
pes_paths.title: Pose Estimation Files

processing_module_key.title: NWB Processing Module
processing_module_key.description: Name of the NWB processing module that holds the pose estimation data.

pose_estimation_key.title: NWB Pose Estimation Key
pose_estimation_key.description: Name of the PoseEstimation object inside the processing module

videos.title: Video Files (Optional)
videos.description: Labeled videos corresponding to the pose estimation files (.mp4, .avi)
